tests.scenario: User manages subscription from account settings
steps: Log in to the Calm account with valid credentials
Navigate to the account settings page
Verify the current subscription plan is displayed
Verify the next renewal date is displayed
Cancel the subscription with a single click
Verify the subscription cancellation is confirmed
tests.expected_result: The user can view their current subscription plan, see the next renewal date, and cancel their subscription with a single click from the account settings page.

tests.scenario: Validate transparent and accurate pricing information on subscription sign-up page
steps: Launch the app and navigate to the subscription sign-up page
Select a subscription plan
Review the displayed pricing information
tests.expected_result: The system displays a detailed breakdown of the costs, including any promotional discounts, taxes, and fees, before confirming the purchase

tests.scenario: Validate automatic sending of subscription confirmation email after plan change
steps: Sign up a user with an existing subscription plan
Change the user's subscription plan to a different one
Confirm the change in the system
Wait for 5 minutes
Check the user's email inbox for a confirmation email
tests.expected_result: The user receives an email within 5 minutes that includes a summary of their new subscription details and a link to manage their subscription

tests.scenario: User accesses meditation sessions and sleep stories library
steps: Launch the app and log in with valid credentials
Verify the user is connected to a stable internet connection
Navigate to the meditation sessions and sleep stories library
Browse through the list of available meditation sessions and sleep stories
Use the search functionality to find specific content
Verify categorization of meditation sessions and sleep stories
tests.expected_result: The user can access a list of at least 500 meditation sessions and 200 sleep stories, with clear categorization and functional search

tests.scenario: Filter and search meditation sessions and sleep stories by category, duration, and narrator
steps: Access the library of meditation sessions and sleep stories
Apply filters for category, duration, and narrator
Enter search criteria for a specific meditation session or sleep story
Submit the search or filter request
tests.expected_result: The system displays a list of relevant results with clear and concise information about each session or story that matches the applied filters and search criteria

tests.scenario: Validate clear and transparent subscription plan information
steps: Launch the app and navigate to the subscription options page
View the available subscription plans
Verify that each plan displays its features
Verify that each plan displays its pricing information
Verify that each plan displays any free trial options
tests.expected_result: The system displays a clear and concise breakdown of features, pricing, and any free trial options for each subscription plan, with no hidden fees or deceptive advertising practices

tests.scenario: Validate navigation to meditation content and search functionality
steps: Open the meditation app
Navigate to the meditation content section
Verify the search functionality is available
Perform a search for a specific meditation
Access the library of meditations
tests.expected_result: The user can search for specific meditations and access their library within 2 clicks

tests.scenario: Validate Google Fit integration with Calm app
steps: Create a test user with a Google Fit account
Connect the Google Fit account to the Calm app
Verify that the Calm app has access to the Google Fit account
Simulate daily physical activity data in the Google Fit account
Wait for 24 hours
Log in to the Calm app and navigate to the health tracking section
tests.expected_result: The daily activity data from Google Fit is displayed in the Calm app

tests.scenario: Validate screen reader navigation for users with vision impairments
steps: Launch the app on a device with a screen reader enabled
Enable the screen reader feature on the device
Navigate to the main menu using voice commands
Access meditation content using voice commands
Verify that all menu items and content are read aloud correctly by the screen reader
tests.expected_result: The user can successfully navigate through the main menu and access meditation content using voice commands, with all menu items and content being read aloud correctly by the screen reader.

tests.scenario: Validate guided meditation session duration and audio playback
steps: Launch the system and navigate to the meditation session selection page
Select a 10-minute meditation session
Start the meditation session
Verify that a calming voice and soothing music are playing
Monitor the session duration and audio playback for the full 10 minutes
tests.expected_result: The system plays a calming voice and soothing music for the full 10 minutes, without interruption or pause.

tests.scenario: Validate sleep story and calming sound looping functionality
steps: Select a sleep story from the available options
Play the selected sleep story
Choose the loop option for the sleep story
Verify that the sleep story continues to play without interruption for at least 30 minutes
Repeat steps 1-4 for a calming sound
tests.expected_result: The system continues to play the selected sleep story or calming sound for at least 30 minutes without interruption when the loop option is chosen

tests.scenario: Daily reminder for meditation or sleep story
steps: Set up a user account with daily reminder enabled
Configure the daily reminder to trigger at a specific time
Trigger the daily reminder at the configured time
Verify the user receives a notification on their device
tests.expected_result: The system sends a notification to the user's device with a suggested meditation session or sleep story

tests.scenario: Validate 7-day free trial offer for new users
steps: Download and install the app
Launch the app and navigate to the sign-up page
Enter valid new user information and complete the sign-up process
Verify the user is redirected to the premium content section
tests.expected_result: The user is offered a 7-day free trial to access premium meditation and sleep content

tests.scenario: Validate clear and transparent monthly subscription pricing structure
steps: Navigate to the pricing page
Verify the monthly subscription option is displayed
Review the pricing breakdown for the monthly subscription
tests.expected_result: The pricing page clearly displays the monthly subscription cost and a list of features included in the subscription

tests.scenario: Validate free meditation and sleep content accessibility without subscription
steps: Launch the app without a user subscription
Verify the user is not prompted to subscribe
Navigate to the meditation content section
Count the number of free meditation sessions available
Navigate to the sleep stories section
Count the number of free sleep stories available
tests.expected_result: The user can access at least 5 free meditation sessions and 2 free sleep stories
